free_text: Proton capture by 11B above the giant resonance
normalization was checked by the simultaneous
measurement of the 15.1 MeV peak from the (p,inl)
reaction on a 12C target, whose cross section is
relatively well known. The rejection efficiency was
controlled through the on-line measurement of the
cylindrical 24 cm x 32 cm NaI crystal surrounded
by a 9 cm x 32 cm NE110 organic scintillator
